articles.description: After a 39-year absence, Leeds are back in the FA Cup semi-finals, with the supporters dreaming of a trophy after a dramatic win over West Ham.
articles.title: FA Cup semi-final: Leeds delight fans by securing Wembley trip after dramatic win at West Ham

articles.description: Manchester City assistant manager Pep Lijnders hints that midfielder Bernardo Silva's could be leaving in the summer.
articles.title: Bernardo Silva: Manchester City assistant Pep Lijnders in departure hint

articles.description: Scotland's Robert MacIntyre misses out on a chance to win a third PGA Tour title as he is overtaken by American JJ Spaun at the weather-interrupted Texas Open.
articles.title: Texas Open: Robert MacIntyre misses out on title before Masters as JJ Spaun gets third win

articles.description: There were 11 minutes of stoppage time at the end of the second half of West Ham's FA Cup quarter-final against Leeds - but was that an excessive or an explainable amount of added time?
articles.title: FA Cup quarter-finals: Was 11 minutes of stoppage time at West Ham against Leeds excessive?

articles.description: Caroline Dubois floored Terri Harper before outpointing her British rival to become the unified lightweight world champion in London.
articles.title: Dubois vs Harper: Caroline Dubois drops and stops Terri Harper to become unified lightweight champion

articles.description: Callum Pritchard is handed a 12-day ban after misjudging the winning post and easing up his horse with a circuit to run at Plumpton.
articles.title: Jockey Callum Pritchard banned for 12 days after Plumpton winning post blunder

articles.description: Leeds United will play Chelsea at Wembley after reaching the FA Cup semi-finals for the first time in almost four decades, while Manchester City take on Southampton.
articles.title: FA Cup semi-final draw: Leeds to play Chelsea and Manchester City face Southampton at Wembley

articles.description: Manchester United look to sell Uruguayan midfielder, Real Madrid forward sparks Premier League interest, Liverpool eye swap deal, plus more.
articles.title: Football gossip: Ugarte, Vinicius Junior, Marcus Leonardo, Onana, Vuskovic, Roefs, Diomande

articles.description: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk apologises to the supporters and says his side "gave up" during their 4-0 FA Cup quarter-final defeat by Manchester City.
articles.title: Virgil van Dijk: Liverpool captain says Reds 'gave up' in FA Cup exit to Manchester City

articles.description: Tadej Pogacar defends his title and wins a record-equalling third Tour of Flanders after dropping rival Mathieu van der Poel 18km from the finish.
articles.title: Tadej Pogacar: World champion equals record with third Tour of Flanders win
